mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_contribution_groups ( id, normalized_url_hash, google_maps_url, place_name_hint, resolved_google_place_id, status, linked_place_id, scrape_job_id, goroute_job_id, admin_note, rejection_reason, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{normalizedUrlHash}, #{googleMapsUrl}, #{placeNameHint}, #{resolvedGooglePlaceId}, #{status, javaType=com.ds.goroute.type.ContributionGroupStatus}, #{linkedPlaceId}, #{scrapeJobId}, #{gorouteJobId}, #{adminNote}, #{rejectionReason}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE place_contribution_groups SET resolved_google_place_id = #{resolvedGooglePlaceId}, status = #{status, javaType=com.ds.goroute.type.ContributionGroupStatus}, linked_place_id = #{linkedPlaceId}, scrape_job_id = #{scrapeJobId}, goroute_job_id = #{gorouteJobId}, admin_note = #{adminNote}, rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_contribution_groups WHERE status = #{status, javaType=com.ds.goroute.type.ContributionGroupStatus}
SELECT * FROM place_contribution_groups WHERE status = 'SCRAPING' AND scrape_job_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY updated_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_contributions WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE pending_contribution_reviews SET overall_rating = #{overallRating}, food_rating = #{foodRating}, price_rating = #{priceRating}, ambiance_rating = #{ambianceRating}, service_rating = #{serviceRating}, text = #{text}, photos = #{photos}::text, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_contributors (place_id, user_id, contribution_id, created_at) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{userId}, #{contributionId}, #{createdAt}) ON CONFLICT (place_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM place_contributors WHERE place_id = #{placeId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_contributors WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, place_id, cid, title, address, google_maps_link FROM places WHERE cid = #{cid} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, place_id, cid, title, address, google_maps_link FROM places WHERE google_maps_link = #{googleMapsLink} LIMIT 1
